title: Calculating Factorials
scenario: Write a C++ function that calculates the factorial of a given integer n. The function should accept an integer input and return the corresponding factorial value. The output should be a code snippet, formatted according to standard C++ conventions.
constraints: Must handle edge cases for negative and large input values

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the C++ code snippet is syntactically correct, following standard C++ conventions.
Check whether the generated code meets the specified constraints (iterative approach and edge case handling).
Evaluate the correctness of the generated code, ensuring it accurately calculates the factorial for specified integer inputs.
Assess the code's readability and maintainability, considering comment quality, variable naming, and overall structure.
